critical_anomaly.description: The length consistency check uses cumulative lengths across all processed columns. This allows length mismatches within individual columns to be masked by compensating mismatches in subsequent columns.

impact.integrity: HIGH - could allow invalid cells to pass verification
impact.availability: HIGH - could crash nodes or cause DoS

phase3.guard_identified: Length validation guard exists at kzg/src/lib.rs:250-258, but error attribution is lost (returns None)
phase3.recommendation: INVESTIGATE: Verify cross-column length compensation attack path
